shortDescription: Working on core investment technology for Canada's fintech unicorn, with over $100 billion in AUA
bullets: Designing and maintaining Corporate Actions workflows to handle major listed company events such as dividends, mergers, and stock splits
Developing backend services to support reliable trade processing across Wealthsimple's investment products
Building internal tooling for the Operations organization to streamline and support day-to-day trade operations

shortDescription: Developed community and revenue features for the world's largest community of book readers
bullets: Integrated a new payment system into the Goodreads Giveaway feature, enabling authors to directly promote their books to millions of readers
Led Brand Safety initiatives to ensure advertisers met content standards across a platform reaching over 1 million customers per month
Overhauled key community features including groups, discussions, and user profiles to improve the experience for Goodreads' core users

shortDescription: Built out the software behind Fulfillment By Amazon, helping sellers expand their businesses
bullets: Developed and shipped features for Fulfillment By Amazon, enabling third-party sellers to fulfill orders through Amazon's Prime network
Owned end-to-end projects to streamline and safeguard the seller inventory inbounding process at Amazon scale
Contributed to new FBA initiatives to expand the program into emerging categories of e-commerce

shortDescription: Worked with the world's largest cloud services provider to maintain their low-latency global CDN
bullets: Worked on CloudFront, a tier-1 AWS service powering a global, low-latency content delivery network used by millions of customers
Owned features to monitor, maintain, and operate Points of Presence (POPs) distributed across the world
Drove improvements to service reliability and availability for high-profile clients dependent on CloudFront's global infrastructure

shortDescription: Developed software for Goldman Sachs to improve experience for high-value investment tools
bullets: Embedded with client Goldman Sachs to own and deliver major features for high-value financial advisor web tools
Designed, developed, and shipped across five distinct production projects over the course of the engagement
Promoted to L1 engineer within one year, reflecting strong performance and an expanded scope of responsibility

shortDescription: Assisted in the teaching and grading of several intermediate to advanced programming courses
bullets: Selected to TA three programming courses — in C++, Java, and Python — based on strong academic performance
Held weekly office hours to support students working through assignments and projects in intermediate-to-advanced coursework
Assisted in delivering course content and grading for classes of up to 250 students across multiple semesters

shortDescription: Worked with a fantastic team of developers to create large-scale software products for companies
bullets: Built full-stack features using React, Spring Boot, and PostgreSQL as part of an agile team delivering custom enterprise software
Co-developed a decision engine designed to be deployed across client companies, handling complex business logic at scale
Contributed across the entire stack from UI to data layer, gaining hands-on experience across the software development lifecycle

shortDescription: Managed a talented team of Queen's students to ideate, develop, and market a software product
bullets: Led a cross-functional team of developers and business analysts to ideate, build, and ship a software product from the ground up
Defined product roadmap and priorities, balancing technical feasibility with user needs and stakeholder expectations
Presented product pitches and progress updates to students, faculty, and potential investors throughout the academic year

shortDescription: Developed the website and other software for Queen's University's official MLH hackathon
bullets: Built and deployed the official QHacks 2020 website using React and Gatsby, attracting over 10,000 unique visitors during the application cycle
Developed the applicant dashboard used by 700+ hackers in the weeks leading up to and during the event
Coordinated all technology operations on the day of the hackathon, supporting teams and keeping event information current in real time
